Building the System
That Keeps Horses
Out of Auctions

The first national protection network built to keep horses out of auctions, by intervening before crisis begins.

We don't rescue horses from kill pens. We make sure they never enter the pipeline.

Horses at Risk Annually Over 200 auctions across the country feed the kill buyer and slaughter pipeline.

Coordinated Prevention Systems No national network existed to prevent horses from going to kill buyer auctions.

National Protection Network The first organized system built to intercept horses before auction. Prevention is really the only scalable strategy that works.
How the System Works

Here's exactly how we keep horses
out of auctions.

Four interlocking steps that keep horses safe — by design.

01
We Identify At-Risk Horses Early

Horses are identified when risk begins — not at the point of crisis. This creates time, choice, and safer outcomes.

Our network identifies at-risk horses before owners are forced into desperate decisions. Early signals — financial strain, health issues, life changes — trigger coordinated support before urgency takes over.

02
We Match Horses With Permanent Guardians

Safe outcomes are organized early, matching horses with permanent guardians before urgency takes over.

Rather than scrambling at the last moment, we build placement pathways in advance. Horses are matched with vetted, prepared guardians before a crisis ever occurs.

03
This System Was Built for You, the Horse Owner

If you're facing a financial strain, a life change, or you haven't been able to find a good home for your horse — you are exactly who we built this for.

Before you consider a sale barn or auction, reach out. We're building the Guardian Network now and want to connect with horse owners who need options.

There is no judgment here. Just a conversation.

Reach Out →
04
Donors, Supporters, and a Store That Gives Back

Protection works only when funding is built in — through the people and community who believe in this mission.

We integrate ongoing funding at the system level — through donors, sponsors, and our HORSEARMY SUPPLY store — so support doesn't depend on emergency fundraising when it's already too late.

The War on Horses

The pipeline starts
at the auction.

When options run out, horses go there by default.

No system existed to stop it.

Until Now.

Every time a horse is bailed out of a kill pen, that money funds the next trip to auction. And the one after that. It keeps getting funded.

The only way to stop it, is to PREVENT it from happening. That's prevention. And it's the only strategy that actually ends the pipeline for good.

"Horses enter the pipeline because there's no system — not because people don't love them."
The Big Vision

A future where:

  • →Horses are protected before auction is ever considered
  • →Owners have safe options instead of crisis selling
  • →Guardians step in before auction to prevent a sale to kill buyers
  • →A national network protects horses together

Where Horses and People Unite
